hero.name: Siva Betha
hero.description: I build scalable backend platforms and real-time data pipelines using Kafka, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
content: I'm a passionate developer with experience in building web applications.
I love creating clean, user-friendly experiences that solve real problems.
When I'm not coding, you can find me reading, hiking, or experimenting with new technologies.

projects.title: REAL-TIME TELEMETRY STREAMING PLATFORM
projects.subtitle: Industrial IoT Data Pipeline
description: Designed a streaming platform that ingests machine telemetry data at 50ms intervals.
Built an event-driven pipeline using Kafka and processed time-series data using InfluxDB.
Implemented WebSocket based visualization for real-time dashboards.

projects.title: EVENT-DRIVEN ANALYTICS PLATFORM
projects.subtitle: Time-Series Data Visualization
description: Built a real-time analytics system to visualize PLC machine data from semiconductor etching processes.
Designed Kafka-based ingestion pipeline with Telegraf and InfluxDB.
Enabled high-frequency data capture and visualization with minimal latency.

projects.title: DOCUMENT PROCESSING PIPELINE
projects.subtitle: AI Document Parsing Tool
description: Developed backend services for document ingestion and parsing.
Integrated AWS S3 and Lambda for serverless processing pipelines.
Implemented session management and secure API architecture.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently looking for new opportunities.
